title: attach: set the terminal size and handle SIGWINCH
body:
Notify conmon when the terminal size changes.  Use the same notification
to set the correct initial size.

Closes: https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/issues/351

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: @cgwalters Could you check if this fixes your issue?
This seems to work well for me!  Thanks a lot @giuseppe !
LGTM, let's get this merged then
